sub_modules.conv3d_coord_next: Combinational coordinate incrementer for streaming depth, row, and column traversal; also generates the end-of-volume condition.
sub_modules.conv3d_valid_region: Combinational valid-convolution region detector that suppresses boundary outputs until a full K1 x K2 x K3 window is available.
sub_modules.conv3d_tap_addr: Combinational per-tap 3D sliding-window address generator for reading previously buffered voxels or selecting the current input voxel.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac_tree: Combinational multiply-accumulate reduction over the flattened 3D convolution window and flattened kernel coefficients.
